articles.title: Nike (NYSE: NKE) CEO Elliott Hill adds to stake with open-market buy
articles.summary: NIKE, Inc. President and CEO Elliott Hill recently increased his stake in the company by purchasing 23,660.235 shares of Class B Common Stock at $42.265 per share in an open-market transaction. This purchase, made on April 13, 2026, increased his direct holdings to 265,247.235 shares. The transaction, permitted under company policy during a post-earnings trading window, signal's the CEO's confidence in the company.

articles.title: Director at Nike (NYSE: NKE) adds 25,000 Class B shares
articles.summary: Timothy D. Cook, a director at Nike (NYSE: NKE), purchased 25,000 shares of Class B Common Stock for $42.43 per share, totaling $1.06 million. This open-market transaction increased his direct holdings to 130,480 Class B shares. The acquisition was conducted within Nike's trading policy guidelines, which permit insider trading during specific windows or under approved 10b5-1 trading plans.
